name: Lo Mein > Loo
recipeIngredient: 2 oz raw lean pork, cut into matchsticks
2 oz raw lean beef, cut into matchsticks
2 oz raw chicken, cut into small pieces
2 oz raw shelled shrimp (cooked will do)
2 oz mushrooms, sliced button or reconstituted dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boil. Add the noodles and cook for 3 minutes. Drain and toss with sesame oil and regular oil, set aside.
2. In four separate dishes, mix each meat with half a teaspoon sherry and half a teaspoon cornstarch.
3. Heat oil in a skillet or wok over high heat. Add meats one at a time, stirring for a few seconds between additions: pork, beef, chicken, shrimp. Once the shrimp are added and tossed, include mushrooms and cabbage. Cook until cabbage is wilted. Stir in scallions, soy sauce, salt, and MSG.
4. Add noodles and bean sprouts to the pan, stirring briefly to combine. Serve hot on a warm platter.
